content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 5, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 5, 2026, focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud infrastructure, enhancing agent autonomy, and resolving critical authentication issues. Key achievements include implementing PKCE for secure OAuth, refining agent tiering in the cloud dashboard, and fixing voice-to-entity binding in local inference.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Cloud Infrastructure & Authentication**
*   Enhanced agent security by minting tokens with specific `trade:order` scopes ([#8254](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8254)).
*   Improved cloud-api reliability by signing Steward proxy requests to satisfy HMAC requirements ([#8256](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8256)) and implementing PKCE for Steward OAuth ([#8259](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8259)).
*   Added `/api/v1/containers` routes for better container management ([#8258](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8258)) and fixed agent pairing URL resolution ([#8262](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8262)).
*   Updated CORS policies to support third-party app origins and necessary headers like `Idempotency-Key` ([#8245](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8245), [#8252](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8252)).

**Agent Autonomy & Orchestration**
*   Enabled autonomous goal-driven loops for monetized apps, allowing agents to manage capped self-spend ([#8250](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8250)).
*   Integrated operator inspector and recovery controls into the app surface ([#8231](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8231)).
*   Exposed explicit Shared vs. Dedicated execution modes in the agent creation wizard ([#8261](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8261)).

**UI/UX & Developer Experience**
*   Applied a "liquid-glass" motion pass to the continuous-chat overlay and home greeting ([#8238](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8238)).
*   Provided a web sign-in helper and `X-App-Id` affordance in the Cloud SDK ([#8251](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8251)).
*   Resolved Windows-specific path issues for `bun` to ensure cloud-api and E2E tests boot correctly ([#8248](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8248)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8263](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8263): Keep local first-run selection local.
*   [#8260](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8260): feat(registry): add @madeonsol/plugin-madeonsol third-party entry.
*   [#8249](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8249): test(cloud-e2e): smoke test for the monetized-app loop on cloud:mock.

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Voice & Inference**
*   [#8234](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8234): Resolved an issue where voice-to-entity binding was unreachable at runtime by correctly registering routes for the `plugin-local-inference` voice pipeline.

## NEW ISSUES

**Cloud Authentication & Credits**
*   [#8253](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8253): Identified a ledger mismatch where app-credits and org-balance inference debits are siloed, preventing seamless spending.
*   [#8257](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8257): Reported a production outage for "Sign in with Eliza Cloud" due to OAuth 400 errors related to PKCE requirements and missing redirect allowlists.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   [#8257](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8257): Discussions confirm the root cause of production login failures stems from Steward's recent auth hardening. The community has identified a two-part fix: deploying the signing secret for the proxy (partially addressed in #8256) and merging the PKCE implementation (#8259) alongside updating the tenant redirect allowlist.
